Any participant on a public Meshtastic MQTT broker can set a malicious node name that executes JavaScript in the browser of every Malla dashboard visitor. Affected files: - src/malla/templates/traceroute_graph.html (line ~832) - src/malla/templates/map.html (lines ~945, 1078) - src/malla/templates/packet_detail.html (lines ~1402, 1452) - src/malla/static/js/relay_node_analysis.js (line ~124) Steps to reproduce 1. Publish a Meshtastic NODEINFO_APP packet to any public MQTT broker with long_name set to a HTML entity i.e `` 2. Wait for malla-capture to store it 3. Open the dashboard Impact Allows unauthenticated remote attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript in the browser, such as: - Phishing overlays - Force redirect to malicious websites - Injection of arbitrary third-party scripts (no CSP restrictions) - Browser resource abuse - Persistent dashboard denial of service", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00174, "percentile": 0.38777}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-ch57-39q2-4crm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-03T21:06:27Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-ch57-39q2-4crm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-ch57-39q2-4crm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-43980"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-03T21:06:27Z", "references": ["https://github.com/zenitraM/malla/security/advisories/GHSA-ch57-39q2-4crm", "https://github.com/zenitraM/malla/commit/4086e2b5f61615a813b70b25bc76095083552135", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-ch57-39q2-4crm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/zenitraM/malla/security-advisories/GHSA-ch57-39q2-4crm", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/zenitraM/malla", "summary": "malla: Stored XSS via Meshtastic node names in multiple frontend pages", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-03T21:06:28Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-ch57-39q2-4crm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "malla"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.1.7"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: malla: Stored XSS via Meshtastic node names in multiple frontend pages
